hoodType: kitchen hood extinguishing and exhaust systems
cleaningFrequencyBands: Tampa's restaurant safety guide says kitchen hood extinguishing systems require servicing by an extinguisher company every six months.
Tampa says kitchen exhaust systems must be maintained free of excessive grease accumulation.
certificateRequirement: Keep service documentation, approved plans, and certification papers on site when fire marshal inspections apply.
serviceTagRequirement: Fire extinguishers and related life-safety equipment must be serviced and tagged current, and approved plans with certification papers must be available for inspections.
reportRetentionRule: Retain hood service records, extinguisher tags, and related fire inspection paperwork with the site's fire-safety records.
suppressionInspectionRequirement: Fire suppression inspections require a functional test for final approval, with utilities turned on and coordination with the fire alarm contractor when alarms are part of the project or occupancy.
